creator: araujobsdport@gmail.com
text:
Hey Maintainership!

The rc file is incorrect! You need to do how the HandBook explain.
See in:
http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/rc-scripts.html
Check the rc script in files/, and build with the correct form!


Best Regards.

-- 
Marcelo Araujo
araujo@FreeBSD.org
http://www.FreeBSD.org
